parameters.content:
## Google Forms entry — Project Starter

Webhook receives the JSON payload posted by `apps-script-bridge.gs` (deployed on your Google Forms response spreadsheet).

Expected request body:

```json
{
  "formName": "公文專案啟動表",
  "data": { "專案名稱": "...", "承辦處室": "...", ... },
  "submittedAt": "2026-05-20T10:00:00+08:00",
  "submitterEmail": "user@example.com"
}
```

The Config node merges in your IDs, then forwards to the shared core sub-workflow.
